description: Payroll of community officials, foreign and needy scholars. In the same hand as T-S NS J41 (PGPID 4671) and T-S Misc.8.9 (PGPID 4646), according to Goitein. Similar names as in T-S Misc.28.42 (PGPID 4641) and Bodl. MS heb. c 28/6 (PGPID 547). See Med Soc II, App. B, 12.
description_he: רשימת שכר לפקידי קהילה, תלמידי חכמים אורחים ועניים.
